case_title: AMPARO DEL RIO VS. SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF EXTENDED

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF EXTENDED LEARING

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $595.00 FILED BY DEL RIO, AMPARO AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF EXTENDED LEARING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 5/8/13 TO DEFENDANT SF STATE UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF EXTENDED LEARNING, "RETURNED TO SENDER/NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD". RE-MAILED TO THE CORRECT ADDRESS.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED APR-17-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF EXTENDED LEARING

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AIMEE ARICA-RISK MANAGEMENT COORD.,DEFENDANT BROUGHT A COPY OF LETTER DATED MAY 6, 2013. LODGED IN FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
